title: 纳米技术
subtitle: Nanotechnology, Nanomaterials, Molecular Engineering
assistant_message: Learn to discuss nanotechnology, its applications, and its impact on various industries.

examples.chinese: 在纳米技术方面，科学家取得了许多突破。
examples.translation: In the aspect of nanotechnology, scientists have made many breakthroughs.
examples.translation_id: Dalam aspek nanoteknologi, para ilmuwan telah membuat banyak terobosan.

examples.chinese: 纳米技术不仅在医学上有应用，而且在电子和能源领域也很有潜力。
examples.translation: Nanotechnology has applications not only in medicine but also great potential in electronics and energy.
examples.translation_id: Nanoteknologi memiliki aplikasi tidak hanya dalam kedokteran tetapi juga potensi besar dalam elektronik dan energi.

examples.chinese: 通过纳米技术来提高材料性能。

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Miao Ling
dialogue.chinese: 在纳米技术方面，科学家取得了许多突破。你觉得纳米技术最大的应用是什么？
dialogue.pinyin: Zài nàmǐ jìshù fāngmiàn, kēxuéjiā qǔdéle xǔduō tūpò. Nǐ juéde nàmǐ jìshù zuìdà de yìngyòng shì shénme?
dialogue.translation: In nanotechnology, scientists have made many breakthroughs. What do you think is the biggest application of nanotechnology?
dialogue.translation_id: Dalam nanoteknologi, para ilmuwan telah membuat banyak terobosan. Menurut Anda, apa aplikasi terbesar dari nanoteknologi?

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Tang Wen
dialogue.chinese: 纳米技术不仅在医学上有应用，而且在电子和能源领域也很有潜力。它正在改变许多行业。
dialogue.pinyin: Nàmǐ jìshù bùjǐn zài yīxué shàng yǒu yìngyòng, érqiě zài diànzǐ hé néngyuán lǐngyù yě hěn yǒu qiánlì. Tā zhèngzài gǎibiàn xǔduō hángyè.
dialogue.translation: Nanotechnology has applications not only in medicine but also great potential in electronics and energy. It is changing many industries.
dialogue.translation_id: Nanoteknologi memiliki aplikasi tidak hanya dalam kedokteran tetapi juga potensi besar dalam elektronik dan energi. Ini mengubah banyak industri.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Miao Ling
dialogue.chinese: 纳米材料有哪些独特的性质？
dialogue.pinyin: Nàmǐ cáiliào yǒu nǎxiē dútè de xìngzhì?
dialogue.translation: What unique properties do nanomaterials have?
dialogue.translation_id: Sifat unik apa yang dimiliki bahan nano?

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Tang Wen
dialogue.chinese: 通过纳米技术来提高材料性能。纳米材料具有超大比表面积和量子效应，这使得它们在催化、传感等领域表现优异。
dialogue.pinyin: Tōngguò nàmǐ jìshù lái tígāo cáiliào xìngnéng. Nàmǐ cáiliào jùyǒu chāo dà bǐ biǎomiàn jī hé liàngzǐ xiàoyìng, zhè shǐde tāmen zài cuīhuà, chuángǎn děng lǐngyù biǎoxiàn yōuyì.
dialogue.translation: Improve material properties through nanotechnology. Nanomaterials have extremely large specific surface areas and quantum effects, which make them perform excellently in fields like catalysis and sensing.
dialogue.translation_id: Tingkatkan sifat bahan melalui nanoteknologi. Bahan nano memiliki luas permukaan spesifik yang sangat besar dan efek kuantum, yang membuatnya berkinerja sangat baik di bidang-bidang seperti katalisis dan penginderaan.

exercises.question: What does 纳米技术 (nàmǐ jìshù) mean?
Complete: 纳米技术不仅在医学上有应用，______在电子和能源领域也很有潜力。
